description: Completeness audit targets for the RN lesson map. When an official NCLEX outline PDF is added to the repo, reconcile its table of contents against these auditIds. This file is the machine-readable checklist; it is not a substitute for clinical source documents.

aliases.DVT: Deep Vein Thrombosis (DVT): Prevention and Nursing Management
aliases.SIADH: SIADH (Syndrome of Inappropriate Antidiuretic Hormone Secretion)
aliases.IBD: Inflammatory Bowel Disease (Crohn Disease and Ulcerative Colitis)
aliases.UTI: Urinary Tract Infection and Catheter-Associated UTI

items: Deep Vein Thrombosis (DVT): Prevention and Nursing Management

requiredTopics.description: Aligns RN master map with premium NCLEX-core curriculum (manifest + PREMIUM_CURRICULUM markdown) — chronic DM, thyroid emergencies, AKI patterns, dysrhythmia management, isolation breadth, adult seizures, suicide safety, high-alert pain systems, insulin/warfarin/beta-blocker/opioid monographs.
items: Diabetes Mellitus: Type 1 and Type 2 Nursing Management
Acute Kidney Injury: Prerenal, Intrarenal, and Postrenal Patterns
Isolation Precautions: Contact, Droplet, and Airborne
Seizures and Status Epilepticus: Acute Nursing Management
Suicide Risk Assessment and Safety Planning
High-Alert Medications: Systems Safety and Independent Double Checks
Multimodal Pain Management: Assessment and Escalation
Insulin: Types, Administration, and Hypoglycemia Response
Opioid Analgesics: Respiratory Depression and Naloxone Reversal
